Hobart Hurricanes Edge Thunder in Thrilling BBL 2025 Opener

Dec 17, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Hobart Hurricanes Secure Dramatic Four-Wicket Win in BBL 2025 Opener

Hobart Hurricanes launched their BBL 2025 campaign with a thrilling four-wicket victory over Sydney Thunder at Ninja Stadium. The win, achieved with just one ball to spare, showcased their ability to perform under pressure and defend last season’s championship mindset.

You can read the full original article on 8jj.com here:
👉 Hobart Hurricanes Thrill: 4-Wicket Win Sparks BBL 2025 Title Defence
